summary.en: A patient-driven care system that uses patients' own time and data to relieve overburdened medical teams.
summary.zh: 以病患自身的時間與資料來減輕醫療團隊負擔的病患主導照護系統。

highlight.en: Its app captures untapped data about patients' lived experience and provides timely triage, freeing doctors to focus on personalized treatment.
highlight.zh: 其應用程式擷取病患親身經歷中未被利用的資料並提供即時檢傷分類,讓醫師能專注於個人化治療。

summary.en: Web infrastructure that gives AI agents instant, scalable browsers for automation at scale.
summary.zh: 為 AI 代理提供即時、可擴展瀏覽器的網路基礎設施,支援大規模自動化。

highlight.en: Provides browser infra with built-in CAPTCHA solving, proxy management, and anti-bot detection so developers can run agents for data collection, testing, and web automation.
highlight.zh: 提供內建 CAPTCHA 破解、代理管理與反機器人偵測的瀏覽器基礎設施,讓開發者執行資料收集、測試與網頁自動化的代理。

summary.en: A two-sided marketplace connecting patients with researchers to accelerate medical research.
summary.zh: 連結病患與研究人員以加速醫學研究的雙邊市集平台。

highlight.en: Builds a patient community offering health management and data aggregation, then recruits real patients for clinical trials, biospecimen sourcing, and real-world data for life science companies.
highlight.zh: 建立提供健康管理與資料整合的病患社群,再為生命科學公司招募真實病患參與臨床試驗、生物檢體採集與真實世界資料。

summary.en: A social platform that builds team culture through online game tournaments for remote and hybrid teams.
summary.zh: 透過線上遊戲錦標賽為遠端與混合團隊建立團隊文化的社交平台。

highlight.en: Tournaments include built-in audio/video chat, ice breakers, and automatic breakout rooms, with leaderboards and trophies to boost employee engagement.
highlight.zh: 錦標賽內建語音/視訊聊天、破冰活動與自動分組會議室,並以排行榜與獎盃提升員工參與度。

summary.en: An AI-native applicant tracking and CRM system built for executive search and recruiting firms.
summary.zh: 為高階獵才與招募公司打造的 AI 原生人才追蹤與 CRM 系統。

highlight.en: Automates repetitive search tasks and adds client collaboration features, letting recruiters execute searches faster and spend more time on relationships.
highlight.zh: 自動化重複的搜尋任務並加入客戶協作功能,讓招募人員更快執行搜尋並投入更多時間於關係經營。

summary.en: AI that filters low-priority email from your Gmail and delivers a clean daily summary.
summary.zh: 從你的 Gmail 過濾低優先郵件,並提供乾淨每日摘要的 AI。

highlight.en: It sends a daily digest of filtered emails with a TLDR for every newsletter, learns your preferences, and works with any email app.
highlight.zh: 它寄送被過濾郵件的每日摘要,並為每份電子報附上重點整理,會學習你的偏好且適用於任何郵件應用程式。

summary.en: An automation-first electronic medical record and infrastructure stack for digital health companies.
summary.zh: 為數位健康公司打造、以自動化為先的電子病歷與基礎設施平台。

highlight.en: Its fully programmable, customizable EMR acts as a co-pilot for digital health and direct primary care practices, cutting admin overhead to give providers more time with patients.
highlight.zh: 其完全可程式化、可客製的 EMR 作為數位健康與直接初級照護診所的副駕,減少行政負擔讓醫護有更多時間陪伴病患。

summary.en: Develops milk-inspired peptide therapeutics to fight infectious diseases and antimicrobial resistance.
summary.zh: 開發源自乳汁的胜肽療法以對抗感染性疾病與抗微生物抗藥性。

highlight.en: It turns anti-pathogenic peptides from human milk into therapeutics for all-age diseases, with bacterial vaginosis as its first indication.
highlight.zh: 它將人乳中的抗病原胜肽轉化為適用於各年齡層疾病的療法,首個適應症為細菌性陰道炎。

summary.en: Payroll and HR software for growing UK teams, replacing spreadsheets and disjointed tools.
summary.zh: 為成長中的英國團隊提供薪資與人資軟體,取代試算表與零散工具。

highlight.en: Built by engineers who scaled Monzo from 400k to 6m customers, it runs payroll in a minute and is certified as payroll software by the UK government.
highlight.zh: 由曾將 Monzo 客戶從 40 萬擴展至 600 萬的工程師打造,可在一分鐘內完成薪資,並獲英國政府認證為薪資軟體。

summary.en: Digital selling tools that make HVAC proposal creation as simple as e-commerce checkout.
summary.zh: 讓暖通空調報價製作如同電商結帳般簡單的數位銷售工具。

highlight.en: It equips HVAC distributors with digital catalogs preloaded with pricing and templates, so contractors can build a professional proposal in under 10 minutes and sell in person.
highlight.zh: 為暖通空調經銷商提供預載價格與範本的數位型錄,讓承包商能在十分鐘內製作專業報價並當面銷售。

summary.en: A payments platform letting former Soviet Union businesses accept payments worldwide via one integration.
summary.zh: 讓前蘇聯國家企業透過單一整合接受全球付款的支付平台。

highlight.en: Positioned as Stripe for the former Soviet Union, it gives local businesses a single integration to accept payments from around the world.
highlight.zh: 定位為前蘇聯國家的 Stripe,讓當地企業透過單一整合接受來自世界各地的付款。

summary.en: A marketplace for buying and selling vinyl records, cassettes, and CDs.
summary.zh: 買賣黑膠唱片、卡帶與 CD 的市集平台。

highlight.en: It targets the fast-growing vinyl market with a transaction-processing platform, taking a 12% cut where the only existing dedicated marketplace is hard to use and handles no payments.
highlight.zh: 鎖定快速成長的黑膠市場,提供可處理交易、抽成 12% 的平台,而現有唯一專屬市集既難用又無法處理付款。

summary.en: Software that turns the UK's independent pharmacies into neighborhood diagnostic centers.
summary.zh: 將英國獨立藥局轉變為社區診斷中心的軟體。

highlight.en: Its software helps pharmacies sell and fulfill COVID-19 and other diagnostic tests locally, with results in 24 hours, aiming to cover all 11,000 UK independent pharmacies.
highlight.zh: 其軟體協助藥局在地販售與履行 COVID-19 及其他診斷檢測,結果 24 小時內提供,目標涵蓋全英國 1.1 萬家獨立藥局。

summary.en: A tool that lets workers get data insights without writing SQL.
summary.zh: 讓工作者無需撰寫 SQL 即可取得資料洞察的工具。

highlight.en: Shape removes the SQL barrier so non-technical workers can access data insights directly, without depending on data teams.
highlight.zh: Shape 移除 SQL 門檻,讓非技術人員無需仰賴資料團隊即可直接取得資料洞察。

summary.en: A digital lending platform offering fast loans to small and medium farmers in Brazil.
summary.zh: 為巴西中小型農民提供快速貸款的數位放貸平台。

highlight.en: Its vertical software lets independent agricultural loan advisors originate loans digitally and manage their operations more effectively.
highlight.zh: 其垂直軟體讓獨立農業貸款顧問能以數位方式承作貸款,並更有效地管理營運。

summary.en: Applies AI to microscopy video to analyze how single immune cells move, interact, and perform over time.
summary.zh: 運用 AI 分析顯微影片,觀察單一免疫細胞隨時間移動、互動與表現的公司。

highlight.en: By evaluating thousands of microscopy videos in parallel, it helps customers develop cell therapies, antibodies, and vaccines faster, cheaper, and with higher success rates.
highlight.zh: 藉由平行分析數千段顯微影片,協助客戶更快、更省成本且更高成功率地開發細胞療法、抗體與疫苗。

summary.en: Develops oral drugs that regulate the immune system to block cancer and autoimmune diseases.
summary.zh: 開發調節免疫系統以阻斷癌症與自體免疫疾病的口服藥物。

highlight.en: Targeting inflammation-driven disease at its root, it has phase 1b psoriasis data and human data in pancreatic cancer, uveitis, and NASH, with 9 drugs and 15 patents.
highlight.zh: 以阻斷發炎根源為目標,已有牛皮癬 1b 期臨床數據及胰臟癌、葡萄膜炎與 NASH 的人體數據,擁有 9 款藥物與 15 項專利。

summary.en: An all-in-one platform for building voice AI agents.
summary.zh: 用於建構語音 AI 代理的一站式平台。

highlight.en: It assembles voice agents from intelligent building blocks including IVR detection models, phone-ready LLMs, and drag-and-drop conversational flow builders.
highlight.zh: 以智慧元件組建語音代理,包含 IVR 偵測模型、適用電話的 LLM 與拖放式對話流程建構器。

summary.en: A no-code tool that handles custom billing workflows using spreadsheet formulas.
summary.zh: 以試算表公式處理客製化計費流程的無程式碼工具。

highlight.en: Positioned as Zapier for billing, it replaces manual work caused by billing-system limits and saves companies from building homegrown systems.
highlight.zh: 定位為計費版的 Zapier,取代因計費系統限制而生的手動作業,讓公司免於自建系統。

summary.en: A no-code builder for LATAM creators to launch branded sites with payments, starting with online coaches.
summary.zh: 讓拉美創作者打造含金流品牌網站的無程式碼建構器,從線上教練起步。

highlight.en: Pitched as Shopify for LATAM's $15B creator economy, its no-code builder gives coaches a branded landing page with payments and subscriber-only content.
highlight.zh: 定位為拉美 150 億美元創作者經濟的 Shopify,其無程式碼建構器為教練提供含金流與訂閱專屬內容的品牌登陸頁。

summary.en: Automatically surfaces voice-of-customer trends and metrics from recorded sales conversations.
summary.zh: 從錄製的銷售對話中自動萃取客戶心聲趨勢與指標。

highlight.en: It mines a company's recorded sales and success calls to help marketing, product, and product-marketing teams find competitive moats, gauge feature demand, and understand customer pain points.
highlight.zh: 挖掘公司錄製的銷售與客戶成功通話,協助行銷、產品與產品行銷團隊找出競爭護城河、評估功能需求並理解客戶痛點。

summary.en: Gives engineering leaders visibility into how engineering effort aligns with business goals.
summary.zh: 讓工程主管看見工程投入與業務目標一致性的工具。

highlight.en: By linking engineers' day-to-day contributions to their intent, it helps leaders make informed hiring and priority decisions and communicate impact to business partners.
highlight.zh: 藉由連結工程師日常貢獻與其意圖,協助主管做出明智的招募與優先順序決策,並向業務夥伴溝通成效。

summary.en: A continuous data-quality monitoring platform that catches data bugs before consumers do.
summary.zh: 在資料消費者之前發現資料錯誤的持續資料品質監控平台。

highlight.en: Lariat automatically extracts, stores, and visualizes data-quality metrics from raw event data through to delivered data products, even as logic and infrastructure change.
highlight.zh: Lariat 自動從原始事件資料到交付的資料產品擷取、儲存並視覺化資料品質指標,即使邏輯與基礎設施改變也能持續運作。

summary.en: A marketplace for leasing commercial real estate, where tenants list their requirements first.
summary.zh: 由租戶先列出需求來租賃商用不動產的市集平台。

highlight.en: Instead of browsing listings, tenants publicly post space requirements and receive inbound from brokers and landlords, even sourcing off-market spaces.
highlight.zh: 租戶無需瀏覽清單,而是公開張貼空間需求並接收仲介與房東的主動聯繫,甚至能找到尚未公開的場地。

summary.en: Helps offline LatAm SMBs manage and accelerate cash flow with AI collection agents.
summary.zh: 以 AI 收款代理協助拉美實體中小企業管理並加速現金流。

highlight.en: Its AI agents remind, collect, and negotiate bills for SMBs, focusing on the underserved Mexican corner shops and their suppliers.
highlight.zh: 其 AI 代理為中小企業催繳、收款並協商帳款,聚焦於服務不足的墨西哥街角商店與其供應商。

summary.en: A low-cost preventive healthcare app providing digital primary care for Latin America.
summary.zh: 為拉丁美洲提供數位初級照護的低成本預防保健應用程式。

highlight.en: Acting as patients' first point of contact, it delivers primary care via chat and app, then orchestrates secondary care across physicians, labs, pharmacies, and clinics.
highlight.zh: 作為病患的第一接觸點,透過聊天與應用程式提供初級照護,再整合醫師、實驗室、藥局與診所的次級照護。

summary.en: A tech-driven, design-to-manufacture home and lifestyle brand building from India.
summary.zh: 從印度起家、科技驅動且設計到製造一體的居家生活品牌。

highlight.en: Its design-to-manufacture-to-consumer model cuts out middlemen to deliver home and kitchen products via D2C, marketplaces, and a B2B wholesale channel.
highlight.zh: 其設計到製造再到消費者的模式去除中間商,透過 D2C、市集與 B2B 批發通路交付居家與廚房產品。

summary.en: A debit card that rewards every purchase with fractional shares of stock.
summary.zh: 每筆消費皆以零股股票回饋的簽帳金融卡。

highlight.en: Each swipe earns guaranteed fractional shares plus a chance to win a full share of a favorite stock.
highlight.zh: 每次刷卡都能獲得保證的零股,並有機會贏得喜愛股票的完整一股。

summary.en: A digital platform for pelvic floor physical therapy.
summary.zh: 提供骨盆底物理治療的數位平台。

highlight.en: Comet Health focuses on delivering pelvic floor physical therapy through a digital platform.
highlight.zh: Comet Health 專注於透過數位平台提供骨盆底物理治療。

summary.en: Payments and scheduling software for solo service professionals in Latin America.
summary.zh: 為拉丁美洲獨立服務專業人員提供金流與排程的軟體。

highlight.en: It automates booking, payments, and invoicing for solo practitioners running appointment-based businesses across LATAM.
highlight.zh: 為經營預約制業務的拉美獨立從業者自動化預約、付款與開立發票。

summary.en: A calendar app to prepare, join, and follow up on virtual meetings, all from the keyboard.
summary.zh: 讓你只用鍵盤就能準備、加入並追蹤線上會議的行事曆應用程式。

highlight.en: Built for a virtual-meeting world, it lets users schedule, prep with context on attendees and past discussions, one-click join, and snooze to follow up.
highlight.zh: 為線上會議時代打造,讓使用者排程、以與會者與過往討論的脈絡準備、一鍵加入,並可延後提醒以便後續追蹤。

summary.en: A mobile VR app that reduces chronic pain using biofeedback from heart-rate sensors.
summary.zh: 運用心率感測生理回饋以減緩慢性疼痛的行動 VR 應用程式。

highlight.en: Described as a VR version of Calm, it ships a $5 headset and HR sensor that turn biometric data into pain-reducing visualizations, and is backed by the NIH.
highlight.zh: 被形容為 VR 版的 Calm,隨附 5 美元頭戴裝置與心率感測器,將生理數據轉為減痛視覺體驗,並獲美國國家衛生研究院支持。

summary.en: A self-service analytics platform where data and business teams collaborate.
summary.zh: 讓資料與業務團隊協作的自助式分析平台。

highlight.en: It frees data teams from being a bottleneck by giving business users more autonomy to back decisions with data on a shared platform.
highlight.zh: 透過讓業務使用者在共享平台上更自主地以資料佐證決策,使資料團隊不再成為瓶頸。

summary.en: An open-source authorization and access control service for developers.
summary.zh: 為開發者提供的開源授權與存取控制服務。

highlight.en: It serves as a centralized platform for handling user authorization and access control so engineering teams can focus on their core products.
highlight.zh: 作為處理使用者授權與存取控制的集中式平台,讓工程團隊能專注於核心產品。

summary.en: A healthcare-at-home marketplace sending nurses and lab techs to patients' homes in Latin America.
summary.zh: 在拉丁美洲派遣護理師與檢驗人員到府的居家醫療市集平台。

highlight.en: Likened to Uber for medical lab work, it dispatches nurses and lab technicians directly to patients' homes for appointments.
highlight.zh: 被比喻為醫療檢驗版的 Uber,直接派遣護理師與檢驗技術員到病患家中進行預約服務。

summary.en: A marketplace where creators sell limited-edition face filter NFTs to their fans.
summary.zh: 讓創作者向粉絲販售限量臉部濾鏡 NFT 的市集平台。

highlight.en: Built by Pixar/Oculus/Facebook veterans, it lets the independent artists behind Snapchat and Instagram filters finally earn money for their work.
highlight.zh: 由 Pixar、Oculus 與 Facebook 資深人員打造,讓製作 Snapchat 與 Instagram 濾鏡的獨立藝術家終於能從作品中獲利。

summary.en: Semi-autonomous AI diagnostics that instantly read medical scans for emergency care teams.
summary.zh: 為急診團隊即時判讀醫療影像的半自主 AI 診斷。

highlight.en: Its AI reads medical scans to help critical care teams diagnose better than radiologists, getting emergencies to treatment faster and discharging non-emergent patients quickly.
highlight.zh: 其 AI 判讀醫療影像,協助重症團隊做出比放射科醫師更佳的診斷,讓急症更快接受治療並迅速讓非急症病患出院。

summary.en: A next-day grocery delivery app sourcing fresh produce directly from local food producers in Europe.
summary.zh: 在歐洲直接向當地食品生產者採購新鮮農產的隔日送達生鮮配送應用程式。

highlight.en: By delivering directly from hundreds of local producers rather than warehouses, Membo gives customers the freshest version of every product.
highlight.zh: Membo 直接從數百家當地生產者配送而非經由倉庫,讓顧客取得每件商品最新鮮的版本。

summary.en: A platform giving companies on-demand access to verified engineers and AI-augmented teams.
summary.zh: 讓企業隨需取得經驗證工程師與 AI 增強團隊的平台。

highlight.en: Its instant search lets companies find and interview engineers, AI-augmented teams, and AI evaluators within seconds across a global network.
highlight.zh: 其即時搜尋讓企業能在數秒內於全球網路中尋找並面試工程師、AI 增強團隊與 AI 評估員。

summary.en: An inclusive mental health benefit giving employees access to culturally responsive therapists.
summary.zh: 讓員工接觸文化敏感治療師的包容性心理健康福利。

highlight.en: Through its web platform, employees access culturally responsive therapists, live community sessions, and self-guided content for emotional well-being.
highlight.zh: 透過其網頁平台,員工可使用文化敏感的治療師、即時社群課程與自助內容來支持情緒健康。

summary.en: An open-source container for building AI desktop agents.
summary.zh: 用於建構 AI 桌面代理的開源容器。

highlight.en: Its ready-made container provides APIs for mouse movement, keyboard input, and screenshot capture, letting developers build computer-use agents that run anywhere.
highlight.zh: 其現成容器提供滑鼠移動、鍵盤輸入與螢幕截圖的 API,讓開發者建構可在任何地方執行的電腦操作代理。

summary.en: Live video signing that lets people view and sign documents during a secure video call.
summary.zh: 讓人們在安全視訊通話中檢視並簽署文件的即時視訊簽署服務。

highlight.en: Its Live eSignatures product lets people sign documents in real time while on a secured video call, bringing in-person transactions online.
highlight.zh: 其 Live eSignatures 產品讓人們在安全視訊通話中即時簽署文件,將原本需面對面的交易搬到線上。

summary.en: A personal hiring page that turns your network and referrals into a curated recruiting pipeline.
summary.zh: 將你的人脈與推薦轉化為精選招募管道的個人徵才頁面。

highlight.en: Built by a veteran of Instacart, Snapchat, and Uber, it tracks referrals shared on LinkedIn, Slack, and Twitter so they don't get lost in the shuffle.
highlight.zh: 由 Instacart、Snapchat 與 Uber 資深人員打造,追蹤在 LinkedIn、Slack 與 Twitter 分享的推薦,避免散落遺失。

summary.en: A nonprofit SMS-based telehealth platform for underserved Americans on Medicaid with chronic disease.
summary.zh: 為使用 Medicaid 且患慢性病的弱勢美國人提供簡訊式遠距醫療的非營利平台。

highlight.en: Its Healthy at Home program uses two-way SMS, weekly diabetes coaching, and health education to reach the millions of Medicaid patients who lack at-home chronic disease support.
highlight.zh: 其 Healthy at Home 計畫運用雙向簡訊、每週糖尿病諮詢與健康教育,觸及數百萬缺乏居家慢性病支持的 Medicaid 病患。

summary.en: Visually monitors satellites and space objects for governments and defense.
summary.zh: 為政府與國防單位以影像監測衛星與太空物體。

highlight.en: It transforms existing Earth observation satellites with software so they can image other satellites as they fly close by.
highlight.zh: 以軟體改造既有的地球觀測衛星,使其能在其他衛星飛掠時對其拍攝影像。

summary.en: A therapeutics platform using bacterial molecules to control inflammation and cure inflammatory disorders.
summary.zh: 運用細菌分子控制發炎以治療發炎性疾病的療法平台。

highlight.en: It awakens the body's innate ability to control inflammation, starting with Crohn's disease before targeting type 1 diabetes and multiple sclerosis.
highlight.zh: 喚醒人體控制發炎的先天能力,先從克隆氏症著手,再瞄準第一型糖尿病與多發性硬化症。

summary.en: Accounts receivable automation that helps companies get paid faster.
summary.zh: 協助企業更快收款的應收帳款自動化平台。

highlight.en: It replaces separate subscription management, invoicing, collections, and cash application tools, acting as a single source of truth for real-time revenue data.
highlight.zh: 取代各自獨立的訂閱管理、開立發票、催收與現金沖銷工具,成為即時營收資料的單一可信來源。

summary.en: Sales AI that helps revenue teams stay organized, move faster, and close more deals.
summary.zh: 協助營收團隊有條理、更迅速並成交更多案子的銷售 AI。

highlight.en: It streamlined behind-the-scenes sales work so nothing slipped through the cracks; in 2025 the platform was sunset after an agreement with a leading AI company.
highlight.zh: 簡化幕後銷售工作使其不致疏漏;2025 年在與一家領先 AI 公司達成協議後平台已停止營運。

summary.en: Provides financing to online revenue-generating businesses, including creators and eCommerce.
summary.zh: 為線上創收企業(包括創作者與電商)提供融資。

highlight.en: Positioned as Pipe for online businesses, it packages assets such as receivables into investable factoring products so creators can raise money.
highlight.zh: 定位為線上業務版的 Pipe,將應收帳款等資產包裝成可投資的保理產品,讓創作者得以募資。

summary.en: A smart headband that uses AI and sensors to immediately detect stroke onset at home and alert 911.
summary.zh: 運用 AI 與感測器在居家即時偵測中風發作並通報 911 的智慧頭帶。

highlight.en: Founded by a biomedical engineer and a critical care physician, it targets the 90% of US strokes that go untreated due to delays in alerting emergency services.
highlight.zh: 由生醫工程師與重症醫師共同創辦,瞄準因延誤通報急救而未獲治療的九成美國中風案例。

summary.en: A unified checking and investment account that invests your full balance while keeping cash instantly accessible.
summary.zh: 整合支票與投資的帳戶,將餘額全數投資同時保有即時動用現金的能力。

highlight.en: Your full balance earns market returns yet stays instantly accessible even when markets are closed; built by two ex-Googlers with CS PhDs from Stanford and UW.
highlight.zh: 餘額全數獲得市場報酬,即使市場休市也能即時動用;由兩位擁有史丹佛與華盛頓大學資工博士的前 Google 員工打造。

summary.en: Next-generation financial analysis and reporting powered by AI agents and natural language.
summary.zh: 由 AI 代理與自然語言驅動的新世代財務分析與報表工具。

highlight.en: It pairs LLMs with autonomous querying and financial reasoning so practitioners run complex analyses via natural language, surpassing spreadsheets and rigid SaaS.
highlight.zh: 結合 LLM 與自主查詢及財務推理,讓從業者以自然語言執行複雜分析,超越試算表與僵化的 SaaS。

summary.en: Builds GPT-based conversational AI assistants trained on your own content.
summary.zh: 以你自己的內容訓練、基於 GPT 的對話式 AI 助理。

highlight.en: Its assistants answer audience questions 24/7, letting creators and businesses scale to unlimited 1:1 conversations to grow revenue and cut support spend.
highlight.zh: 其助理全天候回答受眾問題,讓創作者與企業擴展至無限的一對一對話,以提升營收並降低支援成本。

summary.en: A challenger bank for Canadians living paycheck to paycheck, starting with interest-free cash advances.
summary.zh: 為月光族加拿大人打造的挑戰者銀行,從免息現金預支起步。

highlight.en: It serves 11 million Canadians with interest-free advances monetized via tips and an optional express fee, using this hook to build toward a broader bank.
highlight.zh: 為 1100 萬加拿大人提供免息預支,靠小費與選用快速到帳費獲利,並以此切入點朝更全面的銀行發展。

summary.en: Software that generates factory-ready apparel tech packs in minutes instead of hours.
summary.zh: 在數分鐘內(而非數小時)產出可供工廠使用服飾規格書的軟體。

highlight.en: Serving brands, licensing companies, and manufacturers producing 200+ tech packs a month, it makes designers 3x more productive without new hires.
highlight.zh: 服務每月製作 200 份以上規格書的品牌、授權公司與製造商,讓設計師生產力提升三倍且無需增聘人力。

summary.en: A platform that helps companies generate more inbound revenue from AI search.
summary.zh: 協助企業從 AI 搜尋中創造更多入站營收的平台。

highlight.en: It monitors a brand's visibility in AI search and delivers actionable insights to improve its search rankings.
highlight.zh: 監測品牌在 AI 搜尋中的能見度,並提供可執行的洞察以改善搜尋排名。

summary.en: Compliance-first AI voice agents that automate collections calls for consumer lenders and servicers.
summary.zh: 以合規為先、為消費金融放貸與服務機構自動化催收電話的 AI 語音代理。

highlight.en: Founded by a former Visa product leader behind the Chase Sapphire Reserve and a former PayPal engineering leader, it has raised $5.7M to cut the cost of collections.
highlight.zh: 由打造 Chase Sapphire Reserve 的前 Visa 產品主管與前 PayPal 工程主管共同創辦,已募得 570 萬美元以降低催收成本。

summary.en: An AI workflow engine for building reliable, production-grade AI systems.
summary.zh: 用於建構可靠、可上線 AI 系統的 AI 工作流程引擎。

highlight.en: It turns one-off prompts into structured, reusable workflows with enforced context, typed outputs, and safe re-runs to make AI dependable in production.
highlight.zh: 將一次性提示轉為結構化、可重用的工作流程,具備強制脈絡、型別化輸出與安全重跑,使 AI 在生產環境中可靠運作。

summary.en: A medical device company that created a wireless patch for continuous, accurate breathing monitoring.
summary.zh: 開發出可連續精準監測呼吸的無線貼片的醫療器材公司。

highlight.en: Co-founded by UC Irvine experts, it collects breathing waveforms to build the first large respiratory database, starting with monitoring patients sedated for procedures.
highlight.zh: 由加州大學爾灣分校專家共同創辦,蒐集呼吸波形以建立首個大型呼吸資料庫,先從監測手術鎮靜病患著手。

summary.en: Open-source tooling to monitor machine learning models in production.
summary.zh: 用於監控生產環境機器學習模型的開源工具。

highlight.en: It is building an open-source standard used by enterprise data science teams to operate models reliably and detect and resolve issues.
highlight.zh: 正在打造一套開源標準,供企業資料科學團隊可靠地營運模型並偵測與解決問題。

summary.en: An AI-powered assistant for procurement and strategic sourcing teams.
summary.zh: 為採購與策略尋源團隊打造的 AI 助理。

highlight.en: Backed by Google's Gradient Ventures and YC, it turns unstructured data into actionable insights for industries like CPG, energy, automotive, and aerospace.
highlight.zh: 獲 Google 的 Gradient Ventures 與 YC 支持,將非結構化資料轉為可執行洞察,服務消費品、能源、汽車與航太等產業。

summary.en: Supply chain finance that unlocks capital from inventory for fast-growing consumer brands.
summary.zh: 為快速成長的消費品牌從庫存釋出資金的供應鏈金融。

highlight.en: Positioned as Pipe for supply chain finance, it pays brands' supplier invoices up front so they can pay for inventory only after they've sold it.
highlight.zh: 定位為供應鏈金融版的 Pipe,先替品牌支付供應商發票,讓他們在賣出庫存後才付款。

summary.en: Builds zero-emissions autonomous drone blimps for advertising in hard-to-reach places.
summary.zh: 打造零排放自主無人飛艇,用於難以觸及地點的廣告。

highlight.en: Its autonomous blimps carry advertising messages to new audiences, whether on a beach, outside a convention center, or by a target executive's window.
highlight.zh: 其自主飛艇將廣告訊息帶到新受眾面前,無論是在海灘、會展中心外,還是目標主管的窗邊。

summary.en: Builds comprehensive end-to-end tests for your website with little work from developers.
summary.zh: 幾乎不需開發者動手就能為網站建立完整端對端測試的工具。

highlight.en: Its Autotest lets developers get the benefits of integration testing without wasting dev time, avoiding the cycle of skipping tests and hitting production bugs.
highlight.zh: 其 Autotest 讓開發者享有整合測試的好處而不浪費開發時間,避開跳過測試後在生產環境遇到錯誤的惡性循環。

summary.en: A library of delightful, ready-to-use SwiftUI components for iOS apps.
summary.zh: 為 iOS 應用程式提供精美、即用 SwiftUI 元件的函式庫。

highlight.en: Its high-level components plug into apps and handle responsiveness, localization, accessibility, dark mode, and dynamic font size out of the box.
highlight.zh: 其高階元件可直接嵌入應用程式,內建處理響應式、在地化、無障礙、深色模式與動態字級。

summary.en: An automated phone ordering system for restaurants that ensures no missed calls or orders.
summary.zh: 確保餐廳不漏接電話與訂單的自動化電話點餐系統。

highlight.en: With 33% of customers still ordering by phone, StrideQ has lifted customer sales over 10% and aims to become the point-of-sale system for all restaurants.
highlight.zh: 由於 33% 顧客仍以電話點餐,StrideQ 已讓客戶銷售提升逾 10%,並志在成為所有餐廳的銷售點系統。

summary.en: Grows seaweed to help stabilize the climate.
summary.zh: 種植海藻以協助穩定氣候。

highlight.en: Phykos focuses on cultivating seaweed as a means to stabilize the climate.
highlight.zh: Phykos 專注於種植海藻作為穩定氣候的手段。

summary.en: Connects LinkedIn to your CRM to automate and track sales outreach.
summary.zh: 將 LinkedIn 串接你的 CRM 以自動化並追蹤銷售開發。

highlight.en: It automates outreach workflows and provides activity analytics, saving reps time while giving managers full visibility into LinkedIn outreach.
highlight.zh: 自動化開發流程並提供活動分析,既為業務節省時間,也讓主管完整掌握 LinkedIn 開發成效。

summary.en: A subscription video platform serving Black viewers and creators.
summary.zh: 服務黑人觀眾與創作者的訂閱制影音平台。

highlight.en: It makes it easy for Black viewers to find, watch, and engage with content and creators that reflect their lives and experiences.
highlight.zh: 讓黑人觀眾能輕鬆找到、觀看並參與反映其生活與經歷的內容與創作者。

summary.en: Online convenience stores on DoorDash and UberEats, fulfilled by tiny automated dark stores.
summary.zh: 在 DoorDash 與 UberEats 上、由微型自動化暗店履行的線上便利商店。

highlight.en: It runs convenience stores on delivery apps and uses small automated dark stores to hand items off to delivery drivers.
highlight.zh: 在外送應用程式上經營便利商店,並以小型自動化暗店將商品交給外送員。

summary.en: Provides local onboarding and health-data collection for the health tourism industry.
summary.zh: 為醫療旅遊產業提供在地導入與健康資料蒐集的服務。

highlight.en: Its network of locations and licensed guides collect dental scans and other health data so clinics can onboard customers and create personalized treatment plans.
highlight.zh: 其據點網路與持照導引人員蒐集牙科掃描等健康資料,讓診所能導入客戶並擬定個人化治療計畫。

summary.en: AI for risk adjustment integrity in Medicare Advantage operations.
summary.zh: 用於醫療保險優勢計畫風險調整誠信的 AI。

highlight.en: Its RAF Precision AI boosts coding accuracy, uncovers hidden prospective signals, and increases the audit-defensibility of MAO risk adjustment operations.
highlight.zh: 其 RAF Precision AI 提升編碼準確度、揭露隱藏的前瞻訊號,並增強 MAO 風險調整作業的稽核可辯護性。

summary.en: A recording and editing studio for creating and sharing product GIFs in minutes.
summary.zh: 讓你在數分鐘內製作並分享產品 GIF 的錄製與編輯工作室。

highlight.en: It lets users record, produce, and share product GIFs in minutes that would otherwise take hours with traditional tools.
highlight.zh: 讓使用者在數分鐘內錄製、製作並分享產品 GIF,而傳統工具往往需耗時數小時。

summary.en: An analytics platform that records and queries billions of datapoints for builders.
summary.zh: 為開發者記錄並查詢數十億筆資料點的分析平台。

highlight.en: Built on ClickHouse, ScratchDB automates server configuration, ingestion, queries, replication, and sharding with a developer experience you'll love.
highlight.zh: 建構於 ClickHouse 之上,ScratchDB 自動化伺服器設定、資料匯入、查詢、複寫與分片,帶來令人喜愛的開發者體驗。

summary.en: Async, personalized health education delivered by real licensed doctors.
summary.zh: 由真實持照醫師提供的非同步個人化健康衛教。

highlight.en: Unlike internet searches or AI symptom checkers, its async expert-led process connects people directly with licensed doctors for accurate, one-on-one answers.
highlight.zh: 有別於網路搜尋或 AI 症狀檢查工具,其非同步、由專家主導的流程讓人們直接連結持照醫師,獲得準確的一對一解答。

summary.en: A task scheduling API providing reliable background task queues and cron jobs.
summary.zh: 提供可靠背景任務佇列與排程工作的任務排程 API。

highlight.en: Its simple, well-documented API lets any developer instantly schedule and manage background tasks like notifications, data processing, and third-party integrations.
highlight.zh: 其簡潔且文件完善的 API 讓任何開發者都能立即排程與管理通知、資料處理與第三方整合等背景任務。

summary.en: A women's wellness company making pelvic floor fitness easy with the patented Pippa resistance spring.
summary.zh: 以專利 Pippa 阻力彈簧讓骨盆底健身變簡單的女性健康公司。

highlight.en: Targeting 78 million American women with pelvic floor weakness, its Pippa spring boosts fitness during exercise; the inventor holds 41 patents and first orders shipped in 2025.
highlight.zh: 瞄準 7800 萬名有骨盆底無力的美國女性,其 Pippa 彈簧在運動時提升訓練效果;發明人持有 41 項專利,首批訂單於 2025 年出貨。

summary.en: Simplified digital health insurance for small and medium businesses in the Philippines.
summary.zh: 為菲律賓中小企業簡化的數位健康保險。

highlight.en: Hive Health focuses on making digital health insurance simple for Filipino SMBs.
highlight.zh: Hive Health 致力於為菲律賓中小企業簡化數位健康保險。

summary.en: Fast, simple financing for lending startups that grows with them as they scale.
summary.zh: 為放貸新創提供快速簡便、隨其規模成長的融資。

highlight.en: It buys loans in small quantities first and rewards customers with more capital based on performance; within 4 weeks of launch it purchased $1.3M in loans across 6 customers.
highlight.zh: 先小量買入貸款,再依表現獎勵客戶更多資金;上線四週內就向 6 家客戶購入 130 萬美元貸款。

summary.en: An online delivery-only restaurant group in the Philippines built on its own ghost kitchens.
summary.zh: 在菲律賓以自有幽靈廚房經營的純外送線上餐飲集團。

highlight.en: Using ghost kitchens instead of dining areas and wait staff, it builds affordable, high-margin food brands and reinvests savings into better food and delivery.
highlight.zh: 以幽靈廚房取代用餐區與服務人員,打造平價、高毛利的食品品牌,並將節省成本投入更好的食物與外送體驗。

summary.en: Visual AI shopping where you talk to it and it brings you hundreds of products.
summary.zh: 視覺化 AI 購物,你只要對它說話,它就為你帶來上百件商品。

highlight.en: Soco lets shoppers converse with an AI that surfaces hundreds of relevant products in response.
highlight.zh: Soco 讓購物者與 AI 對話,AI 隨即呈現上百件相關商品。

summary.en: Posture correction software.
summary.zh: 姿勢矯正軟體。

highlight.en: Zen builds software focused on helping people correct their posture.
highlight.zh: Zen 打造專注於協助人們矯正姿勢的軟體。

summary.en: Technologies for scaling up cultured and clean meat production.
summary.zh: 用於擴大培養肉與潔淨肉生產規模的技術。

highlight.en: Micro Meat develops technologies aimed at scaling up the production of cultured, clean meat.
highlight.zh: Micro Meat 開發旨在擴大培養、潔淨肉生產規模的技術。

summary.en: An online university offering practical, industry-focused software and data science programs.
summary.zh: 提供實務、產業導向軟體與資料科學課程的線上大學。

highlight.en: Students build real-world portfolio projects with 24/7 mentorship over Slack and Zoom, plus job-readiness training and access to 200+ hiring partners.
highlight.zh: 學生透過 Slack 與 Zoom 全天候指導打造實作作品集,並接受求職準備訓練及接觸 200 多家招募夥伴。

summary.en: A global operating account designed to earn in one country, live in another, and access assets everywhere.
summary.zh: 讓你在一國賺取、在另一國生活並隨處取用資產的全球營運帳戶。

highlight.en: LootRush positions itself as a borderless operating account for people who earn, live, and hold assets across different countries.
highlight.zh: LootRush 定位為跨國界的營運帳戶,服務在不同國家賺取、生活並持有資產的人。

summary.en: An API to measure and eliminate carbon emissions.
summary.zh: 用於衡量並消除碳排放的 API。

highlight.en: Canopi provides an API that companies can use to measure and eliminate their carbon emissions.
highlight.zh: Canopi 提供 API,讓企業用以衡量並消除自身的碳排放。

summary.en: AI that automates routine phone calls for the US healthcare industry.
summary.zh: 為美國醫療產業自動化例行電話的 AI。

highlight.en: Its HIPAA-compliant, SOC 2 Type 2 certified AI agent handles non-clinical calls like benefit verification, patient intake, and scheduling without human intervention.
highlight.zh: 其符合 HIPAA、通過 SOC 2 Type 2 認證的 AI 代理可在無人介入下處理保險核驗、病患登錄與排程等非臨床電話。

summary.en: An easy accounting platform built for e-commerce businesses.
summary.zh: 為電商企業打造的簡易會計平台。

highlight.en: It connects sales platforms like Shopify, Stripe, Amazon, and Etsy into one ecosystem for consolidated cash flow, automated accounting, and inventory management.
highlight.zh: 將 Shopify、Stripe、Amazon 與 Etsy 等銷售平台整合為單一生態系,提供合併現金流、自動化會計與庫存管理。

summary.en: Prescription home medical equipment ordered online and delivered to patients.
summary.zh: 線上開立並配送到府的處方居家醫療器材。

highlight.en: It handles packaging, logistics, clinical and technical support, and connected-device data for any healthcare company, starting with sleep apnea via heliosleep.com.
highlight.zh: 為任何醫療公司處理包裝、物流、臨床與技術支援及連網裝置資料,並從睡眠呼吸中止症(經 heliosleep.com)起步。

summary.en: A B2B e-commerce and fintech platform supplying medicine to pharmacies and hospitals in Africa.
summary.zh: 為非洲藥局與醫院供應藥品的 B2B 電商與金融科技平台。

highlight.en: Instead of open-air markets with overpriced counterfeits, it offers a managed marketplace with full stock, 24-hour delivery, and credit to help pharmacies grow.
highlight.zh: 有別於價格偏高且充斥仿冒品的露天市集,它提供備貨齊全、24 小時到貨並提供信貸的管理式市集,協助藥局成長。
